summary: 2026-07-07 16:31:29 PDT - Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/simple-count-and-breadcrumb.md`. The branch matches the spec: Simple-mode switching resets `simpleUserCount`, hydration boots in `perParticipant` without echo-saving clean loads, participant availability breadcrumbs are edge-triggered and shape-bounded, and touched files stay within the allowed scope. I found no issues. Targeted Vitest did not run because the read-only sandbox blocked Vite's temp config write with EPERM, not because of a test assertion failure.
